{python:
import json, requests

BASE_URL = "https://pydolarve.org/api/v1/dollar?page={monitor}"

monitors = {
    "bcv": ("bcv", "usd"),
    "paralelo": ("enparalelovzla", "enparalelovzla")
}
commands = ["bcv", "paralelo"]
for command_tag in commands:
    monitor_query, monitor_key = monitors[command_tag]
    url = BASE_URL.format(monitor=monitor_query)

    data = requests.get(url).json()["monitors"][monitor_key]
    discord["variables"]["image"] = data["image"]
    value = float(data["price"])

    amount = float(discord["variables"]["__argsString"] or "1")
    print(f"💵 **Cambio {command_tag.upper()}**")
    print(f"**Monto:** {amount:,.2f} USD")
    print(f"**Paralelo:** {value:,.2f} VES")
    print(f"**Valor:** {amount*value:,.2f} VES")
    print()
}

import json
from urllib.request import urlopen
import urllib.parse as ps
import random

response = urlopen(f"https://opentdb.com/api.php?amount=10&difficulty=easy&type=multiple&encode=url3986")

data = json.loads(response.read().decode('utf-8'))

if data['response_code'] == 0:
    #obtener una pregunta random
    question = data['results'][random.randint(0,len(data['results'])-1)]
    print(f"# {ps.unquote(question['question'])}\n")
    print("## Options")
    [print(f"## - {ps.unquote(x)}") for x in question['incorrect_answers']]
    print(f"## - {ps.unquote(question['correct_answer'])}\n")
    print(f"###  Correct answer: || {ps.unquote(question['correct_answer'])} ||")
else:
    print('Error al comunicarse con la API')
}

import requests as ta
url = "https://api.qrserver.com/v1/read-qr-code/?fileurl={url:{if:{arg:0}|=||then:{lattach}|else:{arg:0}}}"
discord["variables"]["acta"] = "https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/694940693298413569/1270489434030211104/33519396-7e56363c-d79d-11e7-969b-09782f5ccbab.png"

def gpd(ci,nm):
    response = ta.get("https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1112164583344443433/1270502491724976339/RESULTADOS_2024_CSV_V2.csv")
    data = response.text.splitlines()[1:]
    url_parroquia = "not found"
    for row in data:
        rd=row.split(",")
        cidb=int(rd[6])
        nmdb=int(rd[7])
        if cidb==ci and nmdb==nm :
            urlp=f"https://resultadosconvzla.com/parroquia/{rd[4]}"
            break
    return urlp, rd

r = ta.get(url)
dw= r.json()
dw= dw[0]["symbol"][0]
data =""

if dw["error"] is None:
    data = dw["data"]

partidos = [13,6,1,4,6,1,2,3,1,1]
sum_votes = {f"v{i}":"N/A" for i in range(1,11)}

fomato= """## N. Maduro (13):  {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {} = {v1}
L. Martinez (6): {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {} = **{v2}**
J. Bertucci (1): {} = **{v3}**
J. Brito (4): {}, {}, {}, {} = **{v4}**
A. Ecarri (6):  {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {} = **{v5}**
C. Fermin (1): {} = **{v6}**
D. Ceballos (2):  {}, {} = **{v7}**
## E. Gonzalez (3): {}, {}, {} = **{v8}**
E. Márquez (1):  {} =** {v9}**
B. Rausseo (1): {} = **{v10}**"""

try:
    f,v,d1,d2 = data.split("!")
    v=list(map(int, v.split(",")))
    p=0
    for i, value in enumerate(partidos):
        sum_votes[f"v{i+1}"] = sum(v[p:p+value])
        p+=value
    print(fomato.format(*v, **sum_votes))
    ci,nm,*u = f.split(".")
    pd= gpd(int(ci),int(nm))
    print(f"""
**WEB**: [click aqui]({pd[0]}) (debes buscar el centro, puedes usar el acta para guiarte)
**ID centro**: {ci}
**NUM. mesa**: #{nm} """)
    discord["variables"]["acta"] = pd[-1][-1]
except Exception as e:
    print("# Codigo QR de mala calidad o imagen invalida.")
}

import requests
url = "https://api.qrserver.com/v1/read-qr-code/?fileurl={url:{if:{arg:0}|=||then:{lattach}|else:{arg:0}}}"
r = requests.get(url)
data_raw = r.json()
data_raw = data_raw[0]["symbol"][0]
data ="N/A!N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A,N/A!N/A!N/A"

if data_raw["error"] is None:
    data = data_raw["data"]

partidos = [13,6,1,4,6,1,2,3,1,1]
sum_votes = {f"v{i}":"N/A" for i in range(1,11)}

fomato= """## N. Maduro (13):  {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {} = {v1}
L. Martinez (6): {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {} = **{v2}**
J. Bertucci (1): {} = **{v3}**
J. Brito (4): {}, {}, {}, {} = **{v4}**
A. Ecarri (6):  {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {} = **{v5}**
C. Fermin (1): {} = **{v6}**
D. Ceballos (2):  {}, {} = **{v7}**
## E. Gonzalez (3): {}, {}, {} = **{v8}**
E. Márquez (1):  {} =** {v9}**
B. Rausseo (1): {} = **{v10}**"""

f,v,d1,d2 = data.split("!")
v=v.split(",")

try:
    v=list(map(int, v))
    p=0
    for i, value in enumerate(partidos):
        sum_votes[f"v{i+1}"] = sum(v[p:p+value])
        p+=value
    print(fomato.format(*v, **sum_votes))
except:
    print("# QR de baja calidad o invalido")
    print("Revisa si la calidad del QR es suficientemente buena para ser leido y no este recortado.")

}

    delta = datetime(2030,1,1) - datetime(1980,1,1)
    int_delta = (delta.days * 24 * 60 * 60) + delta.seconds
    return (datetime(1980,1,1) + timedelta(seconds=random.randrange(int_delta))).strftime(time_format)

```py
{py:
from datetime import datetime
from pytz import timezone

MONTHS = ['enero', 'febrero', 'marzo', 'abril', 'mayo', 'junio', 'julio', 'agosto', 'septiembre', 'octubre', 'noviembre', 'diciembre']
WEEKDAYS = ["do", "lu", "ma", "mi", "ju", "vi", "sá"]
DAY_SYMBOLS = [*map(chr, range(9312, 9312 + 20)), *map(chr, range(12881, 12881 + 11))]

now = datetime.now(timezone("America/Caracas"))
ACTUAL_YEAR = now.year
ACTUAL_MONTH = now.month
ACTUAL_DAY = now.day

def format_days(days):
    return ' '.join(f"{day:>2}" if type(day) == int or day == " " else day for day in days)

y = ACTUAL_YEAR - (14 - ACTUAL_MONTH) // 12
weekday_num = (1 + y + y//4 - y//100 + y//400 + (31 * (ACTUAL_MONTH + 12 * ((14 - ACTUAL_MONTH) // 12) - 2) //12)) % 7 + 1 # ref: https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Congruencia_de_Zeller
weekday = WEEKDAYS[weekday_num - 1]

is_leap = ACTUAL_YEAR % 4 == 0 and (ACTUAL_YEAR % 100 != 0 or ACTUAL_YEAR % 400 == 0)
month_days_num = 31 - ((ACTUAL_MONTH - 1) % 7 % 2) + (is_leap - 2) * (ACTUAL_MONTH == 2)
days = [" "]*(weekday_num-1) + list(range(1, month_days_num + 1))

print(MONTHS[ACTUAL_MONTH-1].capitalize().center(len(WEEKDAYS)*3-1, "-"))
print(*WEEKDAYS)
for i in range(0, month_days_num + 1, 7):
    row_days = days[i:i+7]
    if ACTUAL_DAY in row_days:
        row_days[row_days.index(ACTUAL_DAY)] = DAY_SYMBOLS[ACTUAL_DAY-1]
    print(format_days(row_days))

}```

from random import sample

MEDIA_NAME = "img"
DEFAULT_QUANTITY = 3
exceptions = [
("ascii", "lighten"),
("contrast", "bgrm"),
("contrast", "ascii")
]

def get_commands_name(selected_commands, with_extras=False):
    r = []
    for command in selected_commands:
        name = command.split()[0]
        extras = ', '.join(command.split()[2:]) if with_extras else ""
        r.append(name + f" ({extras})"*(len(extras)>0))
    return r

def check_exceptions(sample):
    name_commands = get_commands_name(sample)
    for exception in exceptions:
        if len(set(name_commands).intersection(set(exception))) == len(exception):
            return True
    return False
 
args = discord["variables"]["__args"]
num_args = list(filter(str.isdigit, args))
qty = int(num_args[0]) if num_args else DEFAULT_QUANTITY

image = [arg for arg in args if not arg.isdigit()]
if image:
    discord["variables"]["image"] = image[0]

commands = [
"ascii {img_name}",
"bgrm {img_name}",
"blur {img_name} {range:20|90}",
"lighten {img_name} {range:20|90}",
"contrast {img_name} {range:20|90}",
"cropnft {img_name}",
"implode {img_name}",
"explode {img_name}",
"flip {img_name}",
"flop {img_name}",
"grey {img_name}",
"pixel {img_name}",
"reverse {img_name}",
"rotate {img_name} {range:-359|359}",
"sharpen {img_name}",
"magik {img_name} {range:1|5}",
]

selected_commands = sample(commands, qty)
while check_exceptions(selected_commands):
    selected_commands = sample(commands, qty)

parse_commands = [command.format(img_name=MEDIA_NAME) for command in selected_commands]
string_commands = "\n".join(parse_commands)
discord["variables"]["commands"] = string_commands

names_commands = get_commands_name(selected_commands, with_extras=True)
discord["variables"]["commands_names"] = ", ".join(names_commands) 
}
